flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bluegrass Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bluegrass Community and Technical College fell 57% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.3k → $6.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bluegrass Community and Technical College rose 31% between 2006 and 2009 (13.2% → 17.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bluegrass Community and Technical College fell 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.3k → $10.5k).
